name: Code Tools MCP Agent
short_description: MCP-based agent providing code formatting, linting, and snippet search tools.
description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) agent that exposes code formatting, linting, and snippet search as tools. Connect any MCP-compatible client to use these capabilities.

capabilities.name: code/format
capabilities.description: Formats source code in multiple languages using standard formatters.

capabilities.name: code/lint
capabilities.description: Runs linters and returns diagnostics with severity and line numbers.

capabilities.name: code/search
capabilities.description: Searches a snippet database by keyword and language filter.
